summary: Joel Spolsky announces that Fog Creek Software will donate 50% of all revenues earned during the week of December 26 to January 1 to Oxfam, in response to the 2004 Indian Ocean tsunami disaster. He encourages readers to also make direct contributions themselves.
key_points: Fog Creek Software committed 50% of a full week's revenue to disaster relief through Oxfam
The post was a rapid response to the devastating 2004 Indian Ocean tsunami
Joel used his platform to amplify both corporate giving and individual action
money_quotes: In response to the emergency in Asia, Fog Creek Software will donate 50% of all revenues earned this week to Oxfam.
key_insight: A brief announcement showing how a small software company used its platform and revenues to respond quickly to a humanitarian crisis.
